<!--generated by generate_shikinaisha_pages_v24_from_oseno.py--> {{Infobox religious building | name = Urushiyama Shrine | native_name = 漆山神社 | mapframe = yes | mapframe-zoom = 15 | mapframe-wikidata = yes | mapframe-point = none | map_type = Japan | map_caption = Urushiyama Shrine | coordinates = {{coord|38.400657|139.571085}} | map_relief = 1 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] }}
{{nihongo|'''Urushiyama Shrine'''|漆山神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Echigo Province]].

<!--generated by generate_shikinaisha_pages_v25_with_redirects.py--> {{Infobox religious building | name = Urushiyama Shrine | native_name = 漆山神社 | mapframe = yes | mapframe-zoom = 15 | mapframe-wikidata = yes | mapframe-point = none | map_type = Japan | map_caption = Urushiyama Shrine | coordinates = {{coord|38.400657|139.571085}} | map_relief = 1 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] }}
{{nihongo|'''Urushiyama Shrine'''|漆山神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Echigo Province]].

revision.text:
<!--generated by generate_shikinaisha_pages_v25_with_redirects.py--> {{Infobox religious building | name = Urushiyama Shrine | native_name = 漆山神社 | mapframe = yes | mapframe-zoom = 15 | mapframe-wikidata = yes | mapframe-point = none | map_type = Japan | map_caption = Urushiyama Shrine | coordinates = {{coord|38.400657|139.571085}} | map_relief = 1 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] }}
{{nihongo|'''Urushiyama Shrine'''|漆山神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Echigo Province]].
== instance of (P31) ==

<!--generated by generate_shikinaisha_pages_v25_with_redirects.py--> {{Infobox religious building | name = Urushiyama Shrine | native_name = 漆山神社 | mapframe = yes | mapframe-zoom = 15 | mapframe-wikidata = yes | mapframe-point = none | map_type = Japan | map_caption = Urushiyama Shrine | coordinates = {{coord|38.400657|139.571085}} | map_relief = 1 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] }}
{{nihongo|'''Urushiyama Shrine'''|漆山神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Echigo Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Urushiyama Shrine'''|漆山神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Echigo Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Urushiyama Shrine'''|漆山神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Echigo Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Urushiyama Shrine'''|漆山神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Echigo Province]].
